text:
凸】♀】♂】←巨人 is the 9th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The titles is a pictogram of Titans (巨人 in Japanese kanji) attacking Wall Sina, Wall Rose and Wall Maria

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:15) has an ominous vibe and a recognizable distorted violin solo, while the second part (2:16-4:21) is more frantic, with a higher tempo.
